# Tutiq
> AI personal tutor for students K-12 to university. Get instant homework help and personalised explanations for any subject.

## What this site does
Tutiq is an AI-powered personal tutor that helps students from primary school through to university. Ask any question across any subject — maths, science, English, history — and get a clear, personalised explanation at exactly the right level. The AI adapts its language and depth to your age and understanding.

## Who it's for
Students aged 6 to 22, parents supporting homework, and lifelong learners. Works for K-12 schoolwork, GCSE, A-level, university coursework, and beyond.

## Key features
- Instant AI explanations across all subjects
- Age-adaptive tutoring — adjusts to your level
- Step-by-step homework help
- Practice questions and quizzes
- Study path builder — AI creates a personalised learning plan
- Progress tracking across topics

## Pricing
Free tier available with 10 tutoring sessions per day. Pro plan from $5.99/month for unlimited sessions.

## Contact
https://tutiq.app
